caption: In the video, a man with curly gray hair and glasses is engaged in a conversation, likely explaining or emphasizing a point. He is wearing a dark jacket over a white shirt and has a strap across his shoulder, possibly from a bag or camera. The background appears to be an indoor setting with shelves and various items, suggesting it might be a workshop or a similar environment. As he speaks, he uses hand gestures for emphasis, pointing upwards and then bringing his hand closer to his face. The subtitles indicate that he is discussing the impact of "Libraries Without Borders," which has moved him deeply. The scene captures a moment of passionate expression and communication.
